_doc: Oath of the Gatewatch (OGW) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/ogw.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 69C / 60U / 42R / 12M. Collation: sequential. Occasional foil (1:67) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Small set; 69 commons but collated as 70 because there are two versions of Wastes. Five variations of each standard basic land plus 20 expeditions. US printing sequential collation. 36 packs per box. Land/checklist sheet shared with Battle for Zendikar.

draft.tagline: 10 commons · 3 uncommons · 1× rare/mythic · 1 basic land · foil 1:67
